text: Lemon vinaigrette: Whisk together fresh lemon juice, Dijon mustard, a touch of honey, and salt. Slowly stream in olive oil while whisking until the dressing emulsifies. Taste and adjust acidity, sweetness, and salt before tossing with greens or roasted vegetables.

Simple tomato pasta: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta until al dente. Meanwhile, saute minced garlic in olive oil over medium heat, then add crushed tomatoes and a pinch of sugar. Simmer 10 minutes, season with salt and pepper, and toss with the drained pasta. Finish with torn basil and parmesan.

Garlic butter shrimp: Pat shrimp dry and season with salt. Melt butter with minced garlic and red pepper flakes over medium heat, then add shrimp and cook 1-2 minutes per side. Finish with lemon juice and chopped parsley, and serve immediately over rice or crusty bread.

### Instruction:
Translate the following English sentence into French.

### Input:
The cat sits on the mat.

### Response:
Le chat est assis sur le tapis.

Quick pancakes: Whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. In another bowl, beat milk, egg, and melted butter. Combine the two just until no dry streaks remain. Heat a nonstick pan over medium, pour quarter-cup portions, and flip when bubbles cover the surface.

Chocolate chip cookies: Preheat oven to 190C. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy, then beat in eggs and vanilla. Stir in flour, baking soda, and salt, then fold in chocolate chips. Drop rounded tablespoons onto a lined baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes until the edges are golden.

### Instruction:
Explain LoRA in simple terms.

### Response:
LoRA stands for Low-Rank Adaptation. Instead of updating every weight in a large language model during fine-tuning, LoRA learns a small pair of low-rank matrices for each target layer. The base weights stay frozen, so the trainable parameter count drops by orders of magnitude while the model still adapts to the new task.

### Instruction:
What is perplexity?

### Response:
Perplexity is the exponential of the average per-token negative log-likelihood. Lower is better: a perplexity of 1 means the model predicts the next token perfectly, while higher values mean the model is more uncertain. Perplexity is the standard intrinsic metric for language models because it directly measures how well the predicted distribution matches the true text.

Sourdough basics: Combine ripe starter, water, flour, and salt. Mix until shaggy, rest 30 minutes, then perform four sets of stretch-and-folds spaced 30 minutes apart. Bulk ferment until the dough has risen by about 50%, shape, and cold-proof overnight before baking in a preheated Dutch oven at 245C for 20 minutes covered and 20 minutes uncovered.

Quick chickpea curry: Saute onion, garlic, and ginger in oil until soft. Stir in curry powder, cumin, and a pinch of cayenne, then add canned chickpeas, crushed tomatoes, and coconut milk. Simmer 15 minutes, season with salt and lemon juice, and serve over rice with chopped coriander.

Banana bread: Mash 3 ripe bananas and mix with melted butter, brown sugar, egg, and vanilla. Stir in flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and a pinch of salt. Pour into a greased loaf pan and bake at 175C for 55-60 minutes, until a skewer comes out clean. Cool before slicing.
